mapper.update: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.modifyCrCstmr */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV SET CSTMR_NAME = #{cstmrName}, CSTMR_RRN = #{cstmrRrn}, CR_TP = #{crTpCd}, END_YN = #{endYn}, CR_COMP = #{crComp}, NO_JUDG = #{noJudg}, JUDG_PAN = #{judgPan}, RB_STRT_DT = #{rbStrtDt}, RB_ESTI = #{rbEsti}, RB_RATE = #{rbRate}, RB_PRID = #{rbPrid}, AC_REG_DT = #{acRegDt}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq}
mapper.select: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getCrCstmr */ SELECT CSTMR_NAME, CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CSTMR_RRN) AS CSTMR_RRN, CR_TP AS CR_TP_CD, END_YN, CR_COMP, NO_JUDG, JUDG_PAN, RB_STRT_DT, RB_ESTI, RB_RATE, RB_PRID, AC_REG_DT, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FIRST_DT, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(REGST_DTTM), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq}) AS LAST_DT, FN_GET_CODENM(DECODE(CR_TP, '1', 'MSP0033', '2', 'MSP0034', 'MSP0035'), ( SELECT MAX(TP_JINH) FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} AND STAN_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(STAN_DTTM) FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} ))) AS TP_JINH, ( SELECT SUM(SUM_PRC) FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_BOND WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} ) AS TOTAL_PRIC, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(TO_DATE(INOUT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_INOUT WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} ) AS LAST_INOUT_DT FROM MSP_COURT_RCV WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq}
mapper.insert: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.insertCrBond */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_BOND ( CR_BOND_SEQ, CR_SEQ, BOND_NUM, MOBILE_NO, OPEN_DT, UNPD_PRC, INST_PRC, SUM_PRC, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_CR_BOND.NEXTVAL, #{crSeq}, #{bondNum}, #{mobileNo}, #{openDt}, #{unpdPrc}, #{instPrc}, #{sumPrc}, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.insertCrBondByLc */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_BOND ( CR_BOND_SEQ, CR_SEQ, BOND_NUM, MOBILE_NO, OPEN_DT, UNPD_PRC, INST_PRC, SUM_PRC, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SEQ_CR_BOND.NEXTVAL, #{crSeq}, NULL, DTL.MOBILE_NO, DTL.OPEN_DT, DTL.UNPD_PRC, DTL.INST_PRC, DTL.SUM_PRC, DTL.REGST_ID, DTL.REGST_DTTM, DTL.RVISN_ID, DTL.RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_LC_DTL DTL WHERE DTL.LC_DTL_SEQ = #{lcDtlSeq}
mapper.update: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.modifyCrBond */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV_BOND SET BOND_NUM = #{bondNum}, MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo}, OPEN_DT = #{openDt}, UNPD_PRC = #{unpdPrc}, INST_PRC = #{instPrc}, SUM_PRC = #{sumPrc}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_BOND_SEQ = #{crBondSeq}
mapper.select: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getCrBondList */ SELECT BOND_NUM, SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 4, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 8, 4) AS MOBILE_NO, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DT, UNPD_PRC, INST_PRC, SUM_PRC, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = BOND.REGST_ID) AS REGST_ID, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = BOND.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_ID, TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS OPEN_DATE, CR_BOND_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_BOND BOND WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} ORDER BY REGST_DTTM
mapper.insert: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.insertCrRciv */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV ( CR_RCIV_SEQ, CR_SEQ, RCIV_DTTM, STAN_DTTM, TP_JINH, STR_DTL, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_CR_RCIV.NEXTVAL, #{crSeq}, #{rcivDt}, #{stanDt}, #{tpJinh}, #{strDtl}, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )

/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.insertCrRcivByLc */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV ( CR_RCIV_SEQ, CR_SEQ, RCIV_DTTM, STAN_DTTM, TP_JINH, STR_DTL, FILE_DIR, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, FILE_NAME, FILE_ID ) SELECT SEQ_CR_RCIV.NEXTVAL, #{crSeq}, TO_CHAR(MST.ISSUE_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(MST.ISSUE_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), '01', NULL, NULL, MST.ISSUE_ID, MST.ISSUE_DTTM, MST.ISSUE_ID, MST.ISSUE_DTTM, NULL, NULL FROM MSP_LC_MST MST WHERE MST.LC_SEQ = #{lcMstSeq}
mapper.update: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.modifyCrRciv */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV SET RCIV_DTTM = #{rcivDt}, STAN_DTTM = #{stanDt}, TP_JINH = #{tpJinh}, STR_DTL = #{strDtl}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_RCIV_SEQ = #{crRcivSeq}
mapper.select: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getCrRcivList */ SELECT RCIV.CR_RCIV_SEQ, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RCIV_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RCIV_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STAN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAN_DT, FN_GET_CODENM(DECODE(RSV.CR_TP, '1', 'MSP0033', '2', 'MSP0034', 'MSP0035'), TP_JINH ) AS TP_JINH, STR_DTL, DECODE(YN.FILE_YN, 0, '', '등록') AS FILE_REG, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = RCIV.REGST_ID) AS REGST_ID, TO_CHAR(RCIV.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = RCIV.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_ID, TO_CHAR(RCIV.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RCIV_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS RCIV_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STAN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS STAN_DATE, TP_JINH AS TP_JINH_CD, DECODE(YN.FILE_YN, 0, 'N', 'Y') AS FILE_YN, FILE_DIR AS FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, FILE_ID FROM MSP_COURT_RCV RSV, MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV RCIV, ( SELECT COUNT(FILE_ID) AS FILE_YN, CR_RCIV_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV GROUP BY CR_RCIV_SEQ ) YN WHERE RCIV.CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} AND RCIV.CR_RCIV_SEQ = YN.CR_RCIV_SEQ(+) AND RCIV.CR_SEQ = RSV.CR_SEQ(+) ORDER BY RCIV.TP_JINH
SELECT /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getFileNmSeq */ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_COURT_01.NEXTVAL, '00000000000')) AS FILE_NM_SEQ FROM DUAL
/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getEvidenceFileExtList */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0232'

/* RegstCrCstmrMapper."getEvidenceFileSizeTargetChk" */ SELECT B.ETC3 FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0212' AND B.CD_VAL = #{cdVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getEvidenceFileExtList */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0212' AND B.ETC3 = #{etc3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.updateRcivFile */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV SET FILE_DIR = #{realFileDir}, FILE_NAME = #{realFileName}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_RCIV_SEQ = #{crRcivSeq}
/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.deleteFile */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV_RCIV SET FILE_DIR = '', FILE_NAME = '', FILE_ID = '', RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_RCIV_SEQ = #{crRcivSeq}
mapper.insert: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.insertCrInout */ INSERT INTO MSP_COURT_RCV_INOUT ( CR_INOUT_SEQ, CR_SEQ, INOUT_ORDER, INOUT_NAME, INOUT_DTTM, INOUT_PRIC, ETC_MEMO, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_CR_INOUT.NEXTVAL, #{crSeq}, #{inoutOrder}, #{inoutName}, #{inoutDttm}, #{inoutPric}, #{etcMemo}, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: /* RegstCrCstmrMapper.modifyCrInout */ UPDATE MSP_COURT_RCV_INOUT SET INOUT_NAME = #{inoutName}, INOUT_ORDER = #{inoutOrder}, INOUT_DTTM = #{inoutDttm}, INOUT_PRIC = #{inoutPric}, ETC_MEMO = #{etcMemo}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CR_INOUT_SEQ = #{crInoutSeq}
mapper.select:
/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getCrInoutList */
SELECT INOUT_ORDER, INOUT_NAME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(INOUT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INOUT_DT, ( CASE WHEN INOUT_PRIC >= 0 THEN INOUT_PRIC ELSE NULL END ) AS IN_PRIC, ( CASE WHEN INOUT_PRIC < 0 THEN INOUT_PRIC ELSE NULL END ) AS OUT_PRIC, ETC_MEMO, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = INOUT.REGST_ID) AS REGST_ID, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = INOUT.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_ID, TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(INOUT_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS INOUT_DATE, CR_INOUT_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_INOUT INOUT WHERE CR_SEQ = #{crSeq} ORDER BY INOUT_ORDER DESC

/* RegstCrCstmrMapper.getCrInoutTotal */ SELECT INOUT.INOUT_TOTAL, INOUT.INOUT_CNT, ACCT.VAC_BANK_NM, ACCT.VAC_ID FROM ( SELECT #{crSeq} AS CR_SEQ FROM DUAL ) SQ, ( SELECT SUM(INOUT_PRIC) AS INOUT_TOTAL, COUNT(INOUT_PRIC) AS INOUT_CNT, CR_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_INOUT GROUP BY CR_SEQ ) INOUT, ( SELECT ( F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_VAC', 'BANK_CODE', VAC_BANK_CD) ) AS VAC_BANK_NM, VAC_ID, CR_SEQ FROM MSP_COURT_RCV_ACCT WHERE VAC_STAT = 'Y' ) ACCT WHERE SQ.CR_SEQ = INOUT.CR_SEQ(+) AND SQ.CR_SEQ = ACCT.CR_SEQ(+)
